Concept Focus: This page is the navigation hub that groups the harness lessons by likely study need.
Capability expansion by moving from one-shot prompts to controlled context loading is the main technical idea on this page.
Connecting Dots: This page connects to From Prompt Engineering to Context Engineering by moving one layer deeper into agent reliability.
Same Idea, Applied Elsewhere: The same control pattern appears in autonomous coding, support automation, and background workflow orchestration.
Implications: If this layer is weak, the system may look capable in demos but fail under longer, more realistic execution ranges.
Edge Case: The edge case is a long or ambiguous task where the agent must decide whether to continue, reset, summarize, or ask for a new artifact.
